content:
Fiona’s Daily News 5.29
宏观消息：
1⃣️比特币杂志首席执行官披露与特朗普竞选活动的联系："是时候让比特币选出下一任总统了
https://news.bitcoin.com/bitcoin-magazine-ceo-discloses-links-with-trump-campaign-its-time-for-bitcoin-to-elect-the-next-president/
2⃣️Mt. Gox 转移 90 亿美元后，比特币跌破 68,000 美元


币圈消息：
1⃣️交易大神Nachi @@alphawifhat 说自己持有超过 10m 的 $WIF，积极看涨三浪涨到6.79-11.09
2⃣️ $XAI & Arbitrum DAO进行投票：2.69亿美元的游戏催化剂提案
https://www.tally.xyz/gov/arbitrum/proposal/53472400873981607449547539050199074000442490831067826984987297151333310022877
目前投票情况通过概率很大
3⃣️Leverfi $LEVER 强势, OmniZK入局比特币生态
4⃣️Atomical协议更新，推出AVM
https://x.com/atomicalsxyz/status/1795467021703929875

Bitcoin Magazine CEO Discloses Links With Trump Campaign: "It's Time for Bitcoin to Elect the Next President" – News Bitcoin News
David Bailey, CEO of Bitcoin Magazine, has disclosed his nexus with the campaign of former President Donald Trump.
